name: IGH_ActiveObject
summary: Base interface for all objects on the canvas that participate in solutions

methods.name: AddedToDocument
methods.summary: This method will be called when an object is added to a document.

params.name: document
params.doc: Document that now owns this object.

methods.name: AddRuntimeMessage
methods.summary: Add a new message to this object. Valid message type flags are Warning and Error. If the Message string is empty or zero-length no message is added.

params.name: Type
params.doc: Type of message. Only Warnings and Errors are recorded.

params.name: Message
params.doc: Content of message.

methods.name: AppendMenuItems
methods.summary: This function is called when a context menu is about to be displayed. Override it to set custom items.

params.name: menu
params.doc: Menu object to populate.

methods.name: ClearData
methods.summary: This function is called whenever the object needs to clear all solution data. This usually amounts to wiping volatile caches and messages. This function will not affect any other objects, but it will set the Phase flag to Blank

methods.name: ClearRuntimeMessages
methods.summary: Clear all message lists.

methods.name: CollectData
methods.summary: This function is called whenever the object is required to collect all data. Either from Persistent records, from source params or whatever. This step is only performed if the phase flag is Blank or Failed. Upon completion, the phase flag will be set to Collected

methods.name: ComputeData
methods.summary: This function is called whenever the object is required to generate new data. This step is only performed by some objects and only when the Phase flag is Collected. Upon completion, the Phase will be Computed. If this object throws exceptions, it is the responsibility of the caller to set the Phase flag to Failed.

methods.name: CreateAttributes
methods.summary: Create new default attributes for this object. You should only call this function when the Attributes() field is null.

methods.name: DependsOn
methods.summary: Solve the inheritance relationship between this object and a potential parental object.

methods.name: DocumentContextChanged
methods.summary: This method will be called when the document that owns this object moves into a different context.

params.name: document
params.doc: Document that owns this object.

params.name: context
params.doc: The reason for this event.

methods.name: ExpirePreview
methods.summary: Call this function when you suspect that the preview has expired for this object. This will cause the display cache to be eradicated.

methods.name: ExpireSolution
methods.summary: Call this function whenever you do something which expires the current solution. This will make sure all caches are erased, all downstream objects are expired and that the event is raised. The default implementation merely places a call to OnSolutionExpired(), override this function in derived classes to make sure you clear local data caches and expire downstream objects.

params.name: recompute
params.doc: If True, the solution will be recomputed straight away.

methods.name: IsolateObject
methods.summary: Destroy all connections to other objects.

methods.name: MovedBetweenDocuments
methods.summary: This method will be called when an object is moved from one document to another.

params.name: oldDocument
params.doc: Document that used to own this object.

params.name: newDocument
params.doc: Document that now owns ths object.

methods.name: OnAttributesChanged
methods.summary: Raises the AttributesChanged event on the toplevel object.

methods.name: OnDisplayExpired
methods.summary: Raises the DisplayExpired event on the toplevel object.

params.name: redraw
params.doc: If True, the canvas will be immediately redrawn.

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(GH_ObjectChangedEventArgs)
methods.summary: Raises the ObjectChanged event on the current (!not the top level!) object.

params.name: e
params.doc: Fully constructed event arguments.

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(GH_ObjectEventType)
methods.summary: Raises the ObjectChanged event on the current (!not the top level!) object.

params.name: eventType
params.doc: Type of change.

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(String)
methods.summary: Raises the ObjectChanged event on the current (!not the top level!) object.

params.name: customEvent
params.doc: Custom change type name.

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(GH_ObjectEventType, Object)
methods.summary: Raises the ObjectChanged event on the current (!not the top level!) object.

params.name: eventType
params.doc: Type of change.

params.name: tag
params.doc: Tag to apply to the event arguments.

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(String, Object)
methods.summary: Raises the ObjectChanged event on the current (!not the top level!) object.

params.name: customEvent
params.doc: Custom change type name.

params.name: tag
params.doc: Tag to apply to the event arguments.

methods.name: OnPingDocument
methods.summary: Raise the PingDocument Event on the toplevel object and try to find the document which owns this object.

returns.doc: The document which owns this object if successful, or nothing if no document owns this object.

methods.name: OnPreviewExpired
methods.summary: Raises the PreviewExpired event on the toplevel object.

params.name: redraw
params.doc: If True, the viewports will be immediately redrawn.

methods.name: OnSolutionExpired
methods.summary: Raises the SolutionExpired event on the toplevel object.

params.name: recompute
params.doc: If True, the solution will be immediately recalculated.

methods.name: RecordUndoEvent(GH_UndoRecord)
methods.summary: Record an entire undo record.

params.name: record
params.doc: Record to push.

methods.name: RecordUndoEvent(String)
methods.summary: Record a generic object change undo event.

params.name: undoName
params.doc: Name of undo record.

methods.name: RecordUndoEvent(String, IGH_UndoAction)
methods.summary: Record a specific object change undo event.

params.name: undoName
params.doc: Name of undo record.

params.name: action
params.doc: Undo action to record.

methods.name: RegisterRemoteIDs
methods.summary: If this object depends on Rhino Objects, you must register the UUIDs of those objects. Failure to do so will result in faulty event handling.

params.name: id_list
params.doc: The object ID database Grasshopper is responsive to.

methods.name: RemovedFromDocument
methods.summary: This method will be called when an object is removed from a document.

params.name: document
params.doc: Document that now no longer owns this object.

methods.name: RuntimeMessages
methods.summary: Gets the list of cached runtime messages that were recorded during solver-time processes.

params.name: level
params.doc: Runtime message type to retrieve.

returns.doc: A list of runtime message strings.

methods.name: SDKCompliancy
methods.summary: Test whether this object is compliant with a given Rhino version.

params.name: exeVersion
params.doc: Rhino major release (4, 5, ...).

params.name: exeServiceRelease
params.doc: Rhino minor (service) release.

returns.doc: True if this object is compliant with the given Rhino release.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave()
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with the object_changed flag.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave(GH_AutoSaveTrigger)
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with a custom flag.

params.name: trigger
params.doc: Reason for the autosave operation. It is possible that a user has decided to avoid autosave events for specific types, so if you can, try and provide a correct trigger flag.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave(Guid)
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with the object_changed flag.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID of autosave event. Consecutive autosave requests with the same ID will be ignored.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave(GH_AutoSaveTrigger, Guid)
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with a custom flag.

params.name: trigger
params.doc: Reason for the autosave operation. It is possible that a user has decided to avoid autosave events for specific types, so if you can, try and provide a correct trigger flag.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID of autosave event. Consecutive autosave requests with the same ID will be ignored.

properties.name: Attributes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the attributes that are associated with this object. Only set custom attributes if you know what you are doing.

properties.name: ComponentGuid
properties.summary: Returns a consistent ID for this object type. Every object must supply a unique and unchanging ID that is used to identify objects of the same type.

properties.name: Exposure
properties.summary: Gets the exposure of this object in the Graphical User Interface.

properties.name: Icon_24x24
properties.summary: The icon associated with this object.

properties.name: Icon_24x24_Locked
properties.summary: The greyscale icon of this object.

properties.name: IconDisplayMode
properties.summary: Gets the current display mode of the object.

properties.name: IsDataProvider
properties.summary: Gets whether or not this object is capable of emitting data.

properties.name: Locked
properties.summary: Gets or sets the locked flag of this object. Locked objects are ignored during solutions.

properties.name: MutableNickName
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that enables Nick name changes through the menu. The default is TRUE.

properties.name: Obsolete
properties.summary: Gets whether this object is Obsolete.

properties.name: Phase
properties.summary: Gets the solution phase in which this object is currently stuck.

properties.name: ProcessorTime
properties.summary: Gets the most recent measured processor time.

properties.name: RuntimeMessageLevel
properties.summary: Gets the worst-case level of all messages. I.e. if only warnings have been recorded, the level will be ::warning. If even a single error exists, the level will be ::error.

events.name: AttributesChanged
events.summary: Raised whenever the number or kind of attributes changes. This event is handled by GH_Documents who subsequently wipe their attribute caches.

events.name: DisplayExpired
events.summary: Raised whenever the display (on the Canvas) of a certain object becomes invalid.

events.name: ObjectChanged
events.summary: Raised whenever some property of the object changes that would affect remote instances.

events.name: PingDocument
events.summary: Raised whenever an object needs to know which GH_Document it belongs to.

events.name: PreviewExpired
events.summary: Raised whenever the display (in the Rhino viewports) of a certain object becomes invalid.

events.name: SolutionExpired
events.summary: Raised whenever the solution of a certain object becomes invalid.
